title: True or False

contentBlocks.text: A boolean is a value that's either True or False. Comparing two things with == gives you a boolean answer.
Create a variable named is_even set to whether 10 is even — that is, whether 10 % 2 == 0 — then print it.
% is the "remainder" operator. 10 % 2 equals 0 because 10 divides evenly by 2.

starterCode:
# Set is_even to True or False based on whether 10 is even
is_even = 10 % 2 == 0
print(is_even)

testCases.failureMessage: is_even should be True, since 10 divides evenly by 2.

hints: % gives you the remainder of a division. 10 % 2 is 0.
